title: boltonia pekinensis
intro: Boltonia pekinensis, also known as Chinese Aster or Chinese False Aster, is a perennial herb native to China and Mongolia, belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Boltonia pekinensis is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves and flowers can be used to make herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures.
